title: canavalia lineata
intro: Canavalia lineata, also known as beach bean or horse bean, is a perennial climbing legume native to tropical regions. It is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Canavalia lineata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its seeds are also used as a source of protein and fiber in traditional herbal preparations.
